abilities.description: Dark Seer creates a vacuum over the target area that sucks in enemy units, disrupting them and dealing damage.
abilities.name: Vacuum
abilities.story: Ish'Kafel modifies the center of gravity to a place of his choosing.

abilities.description: Surrounds the target unit with a bristling shield that damages enemy units in an area around it.
abilities.name: Ion Shell
abilities.story: The Dark Seer slices holes into the 'Land Behind the Wall,' causing prismatic energy to seep forth.

abilities.description: Charges a target friendly unit with power, giving it a brief burst of movement speed and removes unit collisions. Allows the unit to reach maximum movement speed and cannot be slowed.
abilities.name: Surge
abilities.story: Ish'Kafel once used his speed of mind to navigate the maze between the walls.

abilities.description: Passive cooldown attack. Causes Dark Seer's next attack on a hero to have True Strike, knock an illusion out of the victim, damaging and stunning them based on how far Dark Seer has moved in the past 3 seconds. Max power is reached after 1100 distance moved.
abilities.name: Normal Punch

abilities.description: Raises a wall of warping light that slows and creates replicas of any enemy hero who crosses it. Enemy replicas serve at the Dark Seer's will. Replicas last until they are destroyed, or until the wall's duration ends.
abilities.name: Wall of Replica
abilities.story: The Dark Seer, while unable to return to his natural realm, can channel part of the prismatic wall with powerful strength of mind, sowing confusion amongst enemy ranks.

description: Pulls and manipulates his enemies' positions. A cunning tactician, the Dark Seer excels at manipulating positions of his enemies. Vacuuming and Punching foes into the attacks of his allies, drawing them into the prismatic thorns of his Ion Shell. Armed only with his intellect, he Surges across the land to survey every point of conflict. At strategic locations Ish'Kafel places his Wall of Replica, sowing confusion amongst enemy ranks as an army of duplicates emerge to do battle against their own likenesses.  Initiator Escape Disabler  Bearded, Parent, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Dark Seer's response, "Speed is the heart of battle." is an indirect quote of Chinese military strategist Sun Tzu, who said "Quickness is the essence of war."
